title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at ITC Hotels

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at ITC Hotels
jsonLd.description:
ITC Hotels is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ITC Hotels:
ITC Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels!
